scripts.android:deps:warm: bash -lc 'source ./scripts/ensure-android-toolchain.sh >/dev/null && export GRADLE_USER_HOME="${PICFLOW_ANDROID_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT:-${HOME}/.cache/picflow-mobile-toolchain}/gradle-home" && export HOME="${PICFLOW_ANDROID_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT:-${HOME}/.cache/picflow-mobile-toolchain}/home" && export JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS="${JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS:+${JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS} }-Duser.home=${HOME}" && mkdir -p "$GRADLE_USER_HOME" "$HOME/.android" && cd android && ./gradlew :app:checkDebugAarMetadata'
